import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Calculate installment program detail"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v3/installmentPrograms"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Calculate installment program detailed information.

It returns the installment program that most closely matches specified input.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"price":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (133000 represents 1330) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Goods price"},"downPayment":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Down payment amount (default is 0, amount should be rounded to hundreds)"}},"required":["productCode","price"],"example":{"productCode":"COCONL06","price":{"amount":133000,"currency":"CZK"},"downPayment":{"amount":0,"currency":"CZK"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Detailed information about installment program","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Installment program product code"},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["MINIMAL","FAVOURITE","OTHER"],"description":"DEPRECATED. Do not use this attribute, use attribute `flags` instead. Attribute `type` remains in the API for backward compatibility"},"flags":{"type":"array","description":"Installment program flag. Multiple flags for one program are allowed.","items":{}},"installment":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (250000 represents 2500 CZK/EUR) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"monthly installment amount"},"numberOfInstallments":{"type":"number","description":"installment count"},"detail":{"type":"object","properties":{"installmentDay":{"type":"number","description":"Installment date (day in month)"},"installmentFirstDate":{"type":"string","description":"Date of the first installment"},"installmentLastDate":{"type":"string","description":"Date of the last installment"},"annualInterestRate":{"type":"number","description":"Annual interest rate"},"predictedProvisionDate":{"type":"string","description":"Predicted provision date"},"paidBack":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (250000 represents 2500 CZK/EUR) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Total amount paid by customer"},"rpsn":{"type":"number","description":"RPSN"},"legalline":{"type":"string","description":"Text interpretation of the offer"}},"description":"Calculation detailed information."}},"required":["productCode"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"productCode":"COCONL06","type":"MINIMAL","flags":[{"type":"MINIMAL","delayFirstInstallment":2,"benefit":"TURBO"}],"installment":{"amount":221900,"currency":"CZK"},"numberOfInstallments":6,"detail":{"installmentDay":20,"installmentFirstDate":"2018-09-20","installmentLastDate":"2019-02-20","annualInterestRate":0.1743,"predictedProvisionDate":"2018-08-10","paidBack":{"amount":1331400,"currency":"CZK"},"rpsn":0.19,"legalline":"\"Každou žádost posuzujeme individuálně a uvedené hodnoty jsme vám spočítali na míru.\\nPlatí pro čerpání k 10.08.2018, datum první splátky je k 20.09.2018 a datum dalších splátek vždy k 20. dni v měsíci, počínaje 20.10.2018 a při lhůtě splatnosti 20.02.2019.\""}}}}}}},"422":{"description":"No installment program was found","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Human readable error description errors"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
